dashboard.label: Asset Health Correlation
dashboard.description: Enrich your data with ping health status - correlate endpoint availability with other Splunk data sources

panel.title: Current Asset Health Status (from Ping Monitor)

search.query: index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(_time) as last_check, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(target_ip) as ip_addresses, values(group) as groups, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Healthy", "✅", health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌", true(), "❓" ) | eval last_check_human = strftime(last_check, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval latency_display = if(latency > 0, round(latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | table health_icon, hostname, ip_addresses, health_status, packet_loss, latency_display, groups, entitytype, device, vendor, last_check_human | rename health_icon as " ", packet_loss as "Packet Loss %", latency_display as "Latency", last_check_human as "Last Check" | sort health_status, hostname

panel.title: Correlated Events Enriched with Ping Health

html.p: Events from your correlation index/sourcetype enriched with real-time ping health status

search.query: index=$correlation_index$ sourcetype=$correlation_sourcetype$ | head 1000 | rename $correlation_field$ as correlation_value | lookup local=true ping_health_lookup hostname as correlation_value OUTPUT health_status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms, target_ip as ping_ip | appendpipe [| lookup local=true ping_health_lookup target_ip as correlation_value OUTPUT health_status as health_status_ip, packet_loss_pct as packet_loss_pct_ip, avg_latency_ms as avg_latency_ms_ip, hostname as ping_hostname | where isnotnull(health_status_ip) | eval health_status=coalesce(health_status, health_status_ip), packet_loss_pct=coalesce(packet_loss_pct, packet_loss_pct_ip), avg_latency_ms=coalesce(avg_latency_ms, avg_latency_ms_ip)] | where isnotnull(health_status) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Healthy", "✅", health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌", true(), "❓" ) | table _time, correlation_value, health_icon, health_status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms, sourcetype, index, _raw | sort -_time | head 100 | rename health_icon as "Health", correlation_value as "Asset", packet_loss_pct as "Loss %", avg_latency_ms as "Latency ms"

panel.title: Health Distribution of Assets in Correlated Data

search.query: index=$correlation_index$ sourcetype=$correlation_sourcetype$ | head 10000 | rename $correlation_field$ as correlation_value | dedup correlation_value | join type=left correlation_value [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency by hostname, target_ip | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | rename hostname as correlation_value | append [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency by hostname, target_ip | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | rename target_ip as correlation_value] | dedup correlation_value] | fillnull health_status value="Not Monitored" | stats count by health_status

panel.title: Events by Health Status Over Time

search.query: index=$correlation_index$ sourcetype=$correlation_sourcetype$ | head 10000 | rename $correlation_field$ as correlation_value | join type=left correlation_value [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname, target_ip | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | rename hostname as correlation_value | append [| search index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname, target_ip | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | rename target_ip as correlation_value] | dedup correlation_value] | fillnull health_status value="Not Monitored" | timechart span=1h count by health_status

panel.title: Unhealthy Assets and Their Recent Events

html.p: Shows assets currently experiencing issues along with events from other data sources

search.query: index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary packet_loss_pct>0 | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(target_ip) as ips by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down" ) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌" ) | eval search_term = hostname | map maxsearches=20 search="index=$correlation_index$ sourcetype=$correlation_sourcetype$ (\"$search_term$\" OR host=\"*$search_term$*\") | head 5 | eval matched_asset=\"$search_term$\", asset_health=\"$health_status$\", asset_loss=$packet_loss$" | eval health_icon = case( asset_health == "Degraded", "⚠️", asset_health == "Critical", "🔶", asset_health == "Down", "❌" ) | table _time, health_icon, matched_asset, asset_health, asset_loss, sourcetype, _raw | sort -_time | head 50 | rename health_icon as " ", matched_asset as "Asset", asset_health as "Health", asset_loss as "Loss %"

html.p: Groups assets by entity type and shows overall service health based on ping data

search.query: index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, dc(hostname) as total_assets, values(hostname) as assets by entitytype, group | eval healthy_count = if(packet_loss == 0, 1, 0) | eventstats sum(healthy_count) as healthy_assets, count as total by entitytype | eval service_health_pct = round((healthy_assets / total) * 100, 1) | eval service_status = case( service_health_pct >= 99, "✅ Excellent", service_health_pct >= 90, "🟢 Good", service_health_pct >= 75, "⚠️ Degraded", service_health_pct >= 50, "🔶 Impaired", true(), "❌ Critical" ) | stats values(group) as groups, sum(total_assets) as total_assets, avg(service_health_pct) as avg_health, values(service_status) as status by entitytype | eval avg_health = round(avg_health, 1)."%" | table entitytype, groups, total_assets, avg_health, status | rename entitytype as "Entity Type", groups as "Groups", total_assets as "Total Assets", avg_health as "Health %", status as "Service Status" | sort -avg_health

div.p: To enable real-time health enrichment across all your searches, run the following search to generate a lookup table:
div.pre: index=$events_index$ sourcetype=$events_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss_pct, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms, values(target_ip) as target_ip, values(group) as group, values(entitytype) as entitytype by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss_pct == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss_pct > 0 AND packet_loss_pct < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss_pct >= 50 AND packet_loss_pct < 100, "Critical", packet_loss_pct == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | outputlookup ping_health_lookup.csv
div.p: Schedule this search to run every 5 minutes to keep the lookup current. Then use:
div.pre: | lookup ping_health_lookup hostname OUTPUT health_status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms
